articles.author: Fred  Backus, Jennifer  De Pinto
articles.title: CBS News poll on America at 250 and some of what Americans think is best about U.S. - CBS News
articles.description: Americans weighed in on what's best about the U.S., its greatest invention, most representative food and more in latest CBS News poll.
articles.content:
As America marks 250 years since its founding, CBS News asked Americans to weigh in on what they think stands out about the country. 
Best thing about America
